title: Crispy Syrian Tomato Stir-fry
description: A comforting low-carb-friendly sour dish featuring tomatoes that are caramelized to perfection and served crispy on top.
instructions: Cut the tomatoes into wedges and place them in a mixing bowl.
Slice the onions thinly, mince the garlic cloves finely, and lightly crush red pepper flakes.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the crushed garlic and onion, cooking until translucent (about 2 minutes).
Add salt and lemon juice/vinegar to taste, stirring well to combine.
Toss tomatoes with the sauce mixture, ensuring they are evenly coated. Cook for about a minute on each side, or until slightly softened but still crisp.
Sprinkle red pepper flakes over the tomatoes and toss again to distribute evenly. Remove from heat immediately after adding red pepper flakes to prevent burning.
Serve hot as a side dish with pita bread or hummus.
